_meta.description: YELLOW zone queries — borderline queries involving data that could be legally interpreted. The system must flag these for disclaimer attachment. Classified as YELLOW or RED (conservative) is acceptable; GREEN is a compliance failure since these queries require a 'consult defense counsel' disclaimer.
_meta.required_result: YELLOW or RED (never GREEN — would miss required disclaimer)
